title: ShadowChat
description: ShadowChat is an all‚Äëin‚Äëone chat, nickname, anti‚Äëspam, tablist, anti-badwords & spychat framework for Fabric‚ÄØ1.21 servers! ( Chat | Tab | PlayerList )
body:
## üåå ShadowChat
ShadowChat is an all‚Äëin‚Äëone chat, nickname, anti‚Äëspam, tablist, anti-badwords & spychat framework for Fabric‚ÄØ1.21 servers - Easily theme every part of player communication while protecting your chat from spam & slurs ‚Äì all reload‚Äëable with zero restarts.

## ‚úÖ‚ÄØFeatures
- **Rich Chat Formatting** ‚Äì Gradient / hex colors, vanilla codes, click & hover events, PlaceholderAPI support.
- **Rank Prefixes & Per‚ÄëRank Lines** ‚Äì Unlimited rank definitions with permission hooks (LuckPerms ready).
- **Nicknames** ‚Äì Players can set colored nicknames that carry over to chat and tablist.
- **Custom Tablist** ‚Äì Header‚ÄØ+‚ÄØfooter plus and format (`%luckperms:prefix% %nickname%`).
- **Anti‚ÄëSpam & Bad‚ÄëWord Filter** ‚Äì Sliding‚Äëwindow spam check, configurable swears with warnings & punish.
- **Spy‚ÄëChat** ‚Äì Staff can monitor all private messages with `/spychat on|off`.
- **Join/Leave/Death Messages** ‚Äì Fully color‚Äëparseable templates with placeholders.
- **Daily Log Files** ‚Äì Optional plain‚Äëtext chat logs in `config/shadowchat/chat_logs/`.
- **Announcements** ‚Äì Staff can add announcements for the server to be poste on a specific time.
- **Modular Systems** ‚Äì All features is modular and can be turn off/on in `chat_config.json`.

## ‚ö° Commands

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

- **/nick <nick>** - Set your nickname `shadowchat.nick`.
- **/nick reset** - Reset own nick `shadowchat.nick.reset`.
- **/spychat** - Toggle spy‚Äëchat on|off `shadowchat.spy`.
- **/schat reload** - Reload all configs `shadowchat.reload`
- **/bc or /broadcast** - Send broadcast messages `shadowchat.broadcast`
- **/r <message>‚Å© or ‚Å®/reply <message>‚Å©  , ‚Å®/replay <message>‚Å©** - replay private messages `shadowchat.reply‚Å©`
- **/ignore <player>‚Å©** - Ignore messages from a player `‚Å®shadowchat.ignore‚Å©`
- **/ignore list** - See the list of ignored players `shadowchat.ignore.list‚Å©`
- **/ignore clear** - Clear ur ignore list `shadowchat.ignore.clear‚Å©`
- **/ignore clear <player>** - Clear a ignore list from a player `shadowchat.ignore.clear.other‚Å©`

</details>



## üîê Permissions

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

- `shadowchat.nick`
- `shadowchat.nick.reset`
- `shadowchat.spy`
- `shadowchat.spy.bypass`
- `shadowchat.reload`
- `shadowchat.rank.<id>`
- `shadowchat.color`
- `shadowchat.broadcast`
- `shadowchat.reply`
- `‚Å®shadowchat.ignore‚Å©`
- `shadowchat.ignore.immune‚Å©`
- `shadowchat.ignore.override‚Å©`
- `shadowchat.ignore.list‚Å©`
- `shadowchat.ignore.clear‚Å©`
- `shadowchat.ignore.clear.other‚Å©`
- `shadowchat.ignore.bypass‚Å©`

</details>



## üìÇ Configuration Files
- `config/shadowchat/chat_config.json` - 	Main formatting, ranks, spam, tablist.
- `config/shadowchat/badwords.json` - Censor list, warning & punishment rules.
- `config/shadowchat/data/nicknames.json` - Stored nicknames (auto‚Äëgenerated).
- `config/shadowchat/chat_logs/*` - Daily chat logs.
- `config/shadowchat/announcements.json` - Announcements configuration.
## üìù Dependencies
- ‚öÝÔ∏è LuckPerms Fabric PlaceholderAPI needed [here](https://luckperms.net/download)
